description:
Apply a per-face color overlay to the octahedron banner photos using each section's canonical deep palette color (from FRAC-24's HOUSES.palette.deep). Use a Photoshop-style 'Overlay' blend function (preserves contrast better than mix) at a tunable strength starting at 0.35.

This reintroduces a ShaderMaterial in usePerFaceMaterials (FRAC-20 had removed the prior ShaderMaterial tint). Trade-off accepted because the overlay blend preserves photo detail much better than the prior mix() at 0.55.

Mapping: each face uses its FACE_SECTION_COLORS entry — except where the canonical FRAC-24 palette deep is preferred. For sections in HOUSES (campus, neighborhood, events, school, forum, lab): use housePalette(id, 'deep'). For story / people (not Houses): use their FACE_SECTION_COLORS entry directly.

## Acceptance
- All 8 face photos render with the overlay tint applied
- Photo detail preserved (no washed-out look)
- A single OVERLAY_STRENGTH constant near the shader, default 0.35
- Build + tests pass
- Easy to dial the strength up/down via the constant
title: Overlay each octahedron face photo with its canonical palette color (Photoshop overlay blend)
